executives.name: Ross Beaty
executives.background: Mr. Beaty is a geologist and resource entrepreneur with over 45 years of experience in the international minerals and renewable energy industries. He founded Pan American Silver Corp. and Alterra Power Corp.

executives.name: Greg Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in finance and the mining sector. He was previously President of JDL Gold Corp. and CFO of Minefinders Corporation Ltd.

executives.name: Peter Hardie
executives.background: Mr. Hardie is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously CFO of True Gold Mining Inc.

executives.name: Doug Reddy
executives.background: Mr. Reddy is a professional geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held senior roles at Endeavour Mining and Endeavour Financial.

executives.name: Rhylin Bailie
executives.background: Ms. Bailie has over 25 years of experience in investor relations and communications for mining companies, including roles at NovaGold Resources and Goldcorp.

board_of_directors.name: Ross Beaty
board_of_directors.background: Geologist and resource entrepreneur with over 45 years of experience. Founder of Pan American Silver and Alterra Power.

board_of_directors.name: Greg Smith
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Equinox Gold. Former CFO of Minefinders Corporation Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Lenard Boggio
board_of_directors.background: Former partner at PwC where he led the mining practice. Experienced director for several public mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Wesley Clark
board_of_directors.background: Retired General, US Army. Former Supreme Allied Commander Europe of NATO. Extensive experience in strategic leadership.

board_of_directors.name: Marshall Koval
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Lumina Gold Corp. Over 35 years of experience in executive and technical roles in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Maryse Bélanger
board_of_directors.background: Over 30 years of experience in the mining sector. Former President and CEO of Augusta Gold and COO of Atlantic Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Neil Woodyer
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Aris Mining. Founder and former CEO of Endeavour Mining and Leagold Mining.
